Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay The Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER LLC, RASIER-CA, LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay The Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration:
Defendants' motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted. Plantiffs' "limited opposition" does not substantively oppose the motion or defendants' right to arbitrate this dispute.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
